request_payload.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how outdated laws leave us vulnerable. The 2024 domestic security reforms finally give agencies the tools they need to preempt threats - without trampling rights. Remember the 2023 mall shooting? That could've been stopped if agencies had better data-sharing authority. We can't afford to wait for another tragedy to act. #ModernizeSecurity #DutyFirst
